name: Elme Communities
business: Elme Communities, a Maryland real estate investment trust, owns apartment communities in the greater Washington, DC metro and Sunbelt regions and one office property. As of December 31, 2025, it owned nine apartment communities and one office property. The company has approved a plan of sale and liquidation and is in the process of selling all remaining properties.

exposures.sentence: Our business primarily consists of the ownership of apartment communities in the greater Washington, DC metro and Sunbelt regions.

catalysts.event: Special liquidating distribution of $14.67 per share paid
catalysts.sentence: The special liquidating distribution was paid on January 7, 2026.

catalysts.event: Sale of Elme Sandy Springs and Elme Marietta completed subsequent to year end
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2025, we completed the sale of two of the Remaining Company Properties, Elme Sandy Springs and Elme Marietta, which comprise approximately 800 residential apartment homes for gross proceeds of approximately $112.75 million, a portion of which was used to partially repay the Secured Term Loan, and those properties were released from the mortgages securing the Secured Term Loan.

catalysts.event: Purchase and sale agreements entered for Elme Watkins Mill, Elme Conyers, and Watergate 600 with expected closing in Q1/Q2 2026
catalysts.sentence: As of February 27, 2026, we have also entered into purchase and sale agreements, which are no longer subject to ongoing inspection periods, pursuant to which we expect to sell three of the Remaining Company Properties: Elme Watkins Mill, Elme Conyers and Watergate 600, to various buyers for aggregate gross proceeds of approximately $128.78 million, which are expected to close in the first or second quarter of 2026, subject to satisfaction of customary closing conditions, including, in the case of Elme Watkins Mill, regulatory requirements related to the sale of multifamily properties in Montgomery County, Maryland.

catalysts.event: Target completion of sales of all Remaining Company Properties by mid-year 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company continues to target completion of the sales of all Remaining Company Properties by mid-year 2026.

The Secured Term Loan matures on November 9, 2026, subject to a one-year Borrowers extension option, which is subject to satisfaction of certain specified conditions, including the payment of an extension fee equal to 0.25% of the then outstanding principal amount of the Secured Term Loan and the requirement that no more than $312 million of the Secured Term Loan may be outstanding on the first day of the extended term.
